'''Koved City''' was one of the main [[City/Legends|cities]] on [[Siluria III]]. Located half an hour from the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] main [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]], Koved City was home to [[Governor/Legends|Imperial Governor]] [[Quannith]]'s mansion. Following the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] occupation of the planet, many houses on the edge of the city were abandoned by their owners. However, the mansion [[Dovecote]], owned by [[Kaiya Adrimetrum]], remained in use, primarily as a base for Adrimetrum's resistance fighters.
